articles.title: Ethereum Whales Engage in Strong Selling Spree, Will ETH Price Drop?
articles.description: Coinspeaker Ethereum Whales Engage in Strong Selling Spree, Will ETH Price Drop? Two long-term Ethereum whales from the ICO era re-emerged, collectively selling 33,701 ETH worth $89.11 million as the ETH price rallied to $3,000. Ethereum Whales Engage in Strong Selling Spree, Will ETH Price Drop?
